drinking.caption: the driver is drinking from a bottle or cup while driving

eating.caption: the driver is eating food while driving

interacting_with_phone.caption: the driver is looking at and operating a handheld mobile phone, texting or browsing, while driving

no_violation.caption: a person driving normally with both hands on the steering wheel, attentive and not distracted

reading_newspaper.caption: the driver is reading a newspaper or paper document while driving

talking_on_phone.caption: the driver is holding a phone to their ear and talking on a phone call while driving

working_on_laptop.caption: the driver is using a laptop computer while driving
